name: Winlogon Configuration
categoryDescription: Registry keys that cause code to execute at boot, logon, or via Windows subsystem hooks.
description: Controls logon process: Userinit, Shell, and SpecialAccounts (hidden local accounts).
forensic_value: Userinit/Shell are classic persistence vectors. SpecialAccounts\UserList hides accounts from logon screen (value=0) — attacker backdoor technique.
